title: Long sentences and clauses
description: Complex sentences with multiple clauses — endurance for real writing
text: when she wrote the report, he watched closely; she paused, smiled, and said: "this is the moment we waited for; let's celebrate it well." they did, with joy.
tips: Long sentences need steady pace, not bursts
Take a breath at semicolons — let your brain catch up

character_tips.anna: Long sentences build endurance. Steady tempo wins.
character_tips.maxim: Professional writing is mostly long-form. This is your stamina test.
character_tips.knopych: BIG TEXT BATTLE! 160 chars without errors! 🐉
character_tips.klavochka: Long beautiful sentences — like a story 📖
